payload.answer: This appears to be a duplicate (retry) delivery of the same Slack event. Do not create or update memory from this context alone.

entity_resolution.reason: Input only provides contextual information that the same Slack event ID was delivered twice; no new factual content beyond the retry context.

details: Same Slack event ID delivered twice (retry context).
No durable memory updates applied from the retry context.

repair_options: If the original (non-duplicate) event content is needed, ingest that event payload directly rather than the retry context.
Confirm whether 'Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans' is already stored from the first delivery; if not, ingest the full first event payload.
